mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET available_quantity = available_quantity - 1 WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND available_quantity > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (coupon_id, biz_id, name, description, discount_amount, threshold_amount, valid_from, valid_to, total_quantity, available_quantity, status, create_time) VALUES (#{couponId}, #{bizId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{discountAmount}, #{thresholdAmount}, #{validFrom}, #{validTo}, #{totalQuantity}, #{availableQuantity}, #{status}, #{createTime})
